operations.description: Retrieve all drivers in the organization.
operations.purpose: Used to fetch the list of all drivers available in the Samsara fleet system.
operations.usage: Developers use this API to display drivers in dashboards, driver management panels, or analytics systems.

query_parameters.name: driverActivationStatus
query_parameters.description: Filter drivers by activation status. Defaults to active.

query_parameters.name: after
query_parameters.description: Pagination cursor for fetching the next page.

query_parameters.name: parentTagIds
query_parameters.description: Filter drivers by parent tag IDs.

query_parameters.name: attributes
query_parameters.description: Filter drivers by attribute name-value pairs.

query_parameters.name: updatedAfterTime
query_parameters.description: Return drivers updated after the specified time.

query_parameters.name: createdAfterTime
query_parameters.description: Return drivers created after the specified time.

operations.description: Create or register a new driver in the fleet system.
operations.purpose: Allows administrators or systems to add a new driver to the fleet management platform.
operations.usage: Used when onboarding new drivers or registering drivers in the fleet system.

operations.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific driver.
operations.purpose: Fetch detailed information of a particular driver using their ID.
operations.usage: Used when viewing driver details in driver profile pages or dashboards.

operations.purpose: Allows updating driver attributes such as name, phone number, username, or activation status.
operations.usage: Used when administrators modify driver records in the fleet system.
